message:
Prevent panic on truncated /proc/PID/stat content in ancestry parser

- Replace unchecked slice indexing with .get() and proper error
  propagation when the content is truncated after the comm field's
  closing parenthesis, preventing an out-of-bounds panic on malformed
  or race-condition-truncated proc stat files

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
